welcomeBack: Siyakwamukela futhi, nakhu okwenzekayo ku-akhawunti yakho.
dangerMessage: Awunayo imali eyanele! Udinga okungenani u-R14.00 wohambo olufushane.
warningMessage: Ibhalansi yakho ye-R{{balance}} ingase ingasibekezeli uhambo lwakho olulandelayo. Faka imali manje ukuze ungabambeki.
goodMessage: Ibhalansi yakho ilungile — uvikelekile ohambweni lwendawo enethiwekhini.
